feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Where do you see the automotive industry in 2076 (50 years from now)?
entry.content: Where do you see the automotive industry in 2076 (50 years from now)?
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Why? Why do we still use this? Can't they make a standard where all these connec…
entry.content: Why? Why do we still use this? Can't they make a standard where all these connectors are packed into a single big one, like the main power connector? I hate this so much!
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /b/ Random: Reddit stole gooning from me
entry.content: i used to catfish on reddit and get people to message me off platform (on Session or tele or something) but as of recently, every time i try to post on reddit no matter how innocent, no matter what sub, no matter what account i use - my posts are always instantly taken down "this post has been removed by reddit's filters" reddit has taken away gooning from me. what do i do now? any alternatives? besides killing myself
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >The Odyssey Backlash Failed Tremendously
entry.content: >For all the hysteria over “woke” casting and ahistorical choices, Christopher Nolan’s epic is on track to make $200 million globally during its opening weekend.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: I'm going to be completely honest: this movie is puffed up garbage. There isn't …
entry.content: I'm going to be completely honest: this movie is puffed up garbage. There isn't a polite way to say this. Nolan does not reproduce Homer, and it certainly does not have to be faithful, but he also doesn't confront him, rebel against him, or even reinterpret him in a thought-provoking way. Rather, Nolan uses Homer like expensive seasoning, something to give the illusion of taste in an otherwise generic blockbuster that lacks any exploration of the poem's themes of ancient honor, hospitality, cunn
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /flg/ - F-List General #8377 Hi Miss Edition Previous Thread: >>84161621 F-list …
entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8377 Hi Miss Edition Previous Thread: >>84161621 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise their profiles,
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Imagine the following thought experiment: a country introduces a law mandating t…
entry.content: Imagine the following thought experiment: a country introduces a law mandating that only smartphones set to grayscale by default may be sold there. This is a simple software rule implemented at the factory level, and it is impossible to turn this mode off. What happens? The entire dopamine economy collapses instantly. Smartphone addiction becomes a thing of the past, while the smartphone itself remains a functional, boring tool. Why is there no country in the world that introduces such a simple
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /mu/ Music: >We made our music for prisoners all over the world Actually, prisoners want to …
entry.content: >We made our music for prisoners all over the world Actually, prisoners want to listen to shit like Johnny Cash or Eminem, not your pretentious narcissistic savior-complex music. You make your albums for white suburban 15-30 year-olds with no criminal record worse than a misdemeanor for gratifying an anarchy symbol on a stop sign.
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Can you put body solder on a seam instead of using seam sealer? Seems like the s…
entry.content: Can you put body solder on a seam instead of using seam sealer? Seems like the solder should flow into the cavity and seal it up but AI tells me the flux is corrosive and that it traps water, that it becomes brittle etc. If I can't use a butt weld with a continous seam AND it is in a visibly area what do I do? The seam sealer will show even if overpainted and apparently you can't grind it down, or can you?
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: I can't believe the only life I will have is being an ugly non-white person born…
entry.content: I can't believe the only life I will have is being an ugly non-white person born in a shitty third world country. I don't deserve this shitty life. I deserve being white in my next life. I'd do everything to be a white, blond, and blue-eyed boy born in a first world country, seriously, I'd do everything. I'll just drink chloroform and hope to get a better life in the other world. Because no one and I deserve having a shitty life like mine.
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: Why do trannies get so offended by the phrase "adult human female"? Do they not …
entry.content: Why do trannies get so offended by the phrase "adult human female"? Do they not see themselves as female and secretly know they'll always be men? If they truly believed they were women, then they wouldn't be mad at a definition that would seemingly describe them
entry.dc:creator: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: You wake up on the ground in the MAID containment zone. You have no idea how you…
entry.content: You wake up on the ground in the MAID containment zone. You have no idea how you got there. As you open your eyes, a young man, barefoot, is kneeling next to you in the heavy rain (pic related). He's shivering and looks hungry and tired. His clothes are completely soaked through, and he looks like he hasn't showered in days. He says he's been waiting next to you for the past ten hours. He says his companion was killed by the MAID drones as he tried to escape the containment zone. He asks if you
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /g/ Technology: If making frontier models using distillation alone was so easy, why hasn't Europ…
entry.content: If making frontier models using distillation alone was so easy, why hasn't Europe, India, Russia, Japan, SK or a wealthy gulf state just distillated their own SOTA model by now? Hell, why hasn't Meta or Grok made their own Fable 5 model via distillation? They all have access to a lot more compute than Chinese companies too.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #3028
entry.content: >Onsen Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/84175341/ >Scripts to check image metadata: rentry.org/h
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /mu/ Music: CONSUME THE CUM
entry.content: "Sonic Youth and Swans were thoroughly ignored by the New York press and the Village Voice, which is where Robert Christgau wrote. He wrote this review of Big Black and said, 'Big Black make Swans and Sonic Youth look like limp dick poseurs.' What I did in response to this idiotic slight was, I got a glassine baggie and I masturbated into it, sealed it, and sent the baggie to Christgau care of the Village Voice with a note saying, 'Mr Christgau, please drink this. Yours sincerely, Michael Gira.'
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Grezzo Zelda
entry.content: So what's next for Grezzo and Zelda A Link to the Past remake or A new top down Zelda I feel like they should go for a new game as they're free to go wild but given how unclear the old designs were in some situations they can demonstrate a fair bit of creative licence

entry.title: /g/ Technology: suffering from success
entry.content: in august 2025, i bought a 16GB SODIMM for my puny dual-core i3 laptop, thus increasing its total RAM to 20GB (4GB soldered). i paid like $50 for that stick, it was a crucial-branded one too. of course, it's not very useful. i wish i bought a 2TB SSD instead. what can i do with it? am i shit outta luck?
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Teen idols have matured at their peril since Del Shannon told us the name he was…
entry.content: Teen idols have matured at their peril since Del Shannon told us the name he was born with, and between the Internet gossip roast and Carson Daly's Dick Clark act, the current crop will have it even tougher. Which makes this meeting of L.A. Reid's double-platinum Philadelphia white girl and justly forgotten 4 Non Blondes emoter Linda Perry even more of a feat. These are pop songs in the sense that they deliver their payloads in 90 seconds. But they're also confessional, dark, downtempo--and, OK,
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Will anyone ever be able to succeed in creating a good Space RPG, or is it the w…

entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Do you ever start a game, play for a few days, genuinely enjoy it, get bored wit…
entry.content: Do you ever start a game, play for a few days, genuinely enjoy it, get bored with it, keep it installed for a time being, return to it after a few months or years and then finish it? Or do you always finish it in one go? I used to be the second one, but now honestly, it's pain to play one thing for more than a couple of hours
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Odyssey [The]
entry.content: pure shit. flashbacks over flashbacks. Its a non linear narrative told from flashbacks within flashbacks. Some camera shots looks nice but a way too short and don't really capture the epicness that it should have. At one point, early on, you no longer care about underlying narrative, story. This seems like a reimaginaring script from some new age whamen. Characters have no deepth. Some characters and settings look out of place, or simply too much of current time. Temples and hosues have the same
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film
